commit_scope: Add a Form-native whole-lifecycle fitness receipt for machines, nutrition, robots, and therapeutic substances

local_validation.notes: The lifecycle-fitness receipt proves ten lanes across Go/Rust/TypeScript with verdict 1111111111: machine whole-lifecycle fitness, ingestible nutrition whole-lifecycle fitness, robot molecular human benefit, condition-specific therapeutic substance benefit, and six refusal paths. A TypeScript-only divergence in long nested health-effect validators was root caused to the validator shape: every individual gate agreed, while the deep nested and fold did not. The final implementation uses explicit scored gate lists for those deep validators.

ci_validation.notes: PR CI has not run yet for this branch.

commands: Hostinger Auto Deploy on main after merge
deploy_validation.notes: No public route behavior changes are expected from this Form stdlib/documentation slice; deploy proof should confirm public web/API canaries remain healthy after merge.

phase_gate.reason: Local focused validation passed; PR CI and deploy proof remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form can now express whole-lifecycle fitness and health-effect claims as executable receipts. Supported claims prove only when lifecycle phases, all parts, ingestion boundaries, molecular/cellular/organism evidence, dose/toxicity, stop boundaries, and witness gates are present. Universal cure claims refuse with overbroad-cure-claim.
test_flows: Run the receipt band and verify Go/Rust/TypeScript agree on 1111111111.
Verify a robot molecular benefit without a molecular marker returns molecular-benefit-proof-missing.
Verify a universal cure claim returns overbroad-cure-claim.
